articles.headline: Thomas Tuchel on entertaining England: 'People in pubs will like this'
articles.description: Thomas Tuchel wants to keep thrilling fans in pubs up and down the country after England's manager thought of the wild scenes at home while stood on the touchline.

images.name: Fans watch a screening of the FIFA World Cup match between England and Croatia  [1296x729]
images.credit: Steven Paston/PA Images via Getty Images

images.name: Where does England's performance rank against the favourites?
images.caption: Where does England's performance rank against the favourites?

articles.headline: World Cup Daily LIVE: Switzerland, Bosnia-Herzegovina continue Matchweek 2
articles.description: The second round of matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup is underway today! Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition.

images.name: Bosnia, Dzeko [1296x729]
images.credit: Alex Livesey - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Czechia warmup 260618 [1296x729]
images.caption: Czechia warmup
images.credit: Julian Finney - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Cristiano Ronaldo #7 of Portugal reacts after failing to score in the second half  [1296x729]
images.caption: Cristiano Ronaldo #7 of Portugal reacts after failing to score in the second half
images.credit: Leslie Plaza Johnson/Icon Sportswire via Getty Images

images.name: Cristiano Ronaldo ignores media after Portugal vs. DR Congo
images.caption: Cristiano Ronaldo ignores media after Portugal vs. DR Congo

articles.headline: First week of World Cup betting brings record action at U.S. Sportsbooks
articles.description: There's been plenty of action at the books in the first week of games, from superstar goals to shocking draws.

images.name: USA [1296x729]
images.caption: After a 4-1 win over Paraguay, the U.S. is off to a hot start at the World Cup, attracting lots of handle from bettors.
images.alt: Christian Pulisic #10 and Weston McKennie #8 of the United States celebrate their side's first goal, an own goal by Damian Bobadilla #16 of Paraguay (not pictured), during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group D match between USA and Paraguay at Los Angeles Stadi
images.credit: Matt McNulty - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Cristiano Ronaldo [608x342]
images.caption: Portugal saw their World Cup odds lengthen following Wednesday's 1-1 draw with Congo DR.

images.name: Kylian Mbappe [1296x729]
images.caption: Kylian Mbappe and France are favorites to win their third World Cup.

images.name: Spain [1296x729]
images.caption: After an exhilarating match which saw them draw with Cape Verde, Spain is now second on the odds board to win the World Cup.
images.alt: FerrÃ¡n Torres #7 of Spain dribbles during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group H match between Spain and Cape Verde on June 15th, 2026 at Atlanta Stadium in Atlanta, GA.

images.name: Felix Nmecha [576x324]
images.caption: Felix Nmecha and Germany open strong against Curacao.
images.alt: Felix Nmecha #23 of Germany celebrates his goal by pretending to take off his crown during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match.

images.name: Vinicius Jr. [1296x729]
images.caption: With a 1-1 draw, Brazil saw their odds to win the World Cup lengthen from +950 to 11-1.
images.alt: Vinicius Junior of Brazil runs with the ball during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match between Brazil and Morocco at New York New Jersey Stadium on June 13, 2026 in East Rutherford, New Jersey.
images.credit: Shaun Botterill - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Yamale for WC Odds file (260529) [1296x729]
images.caption: Spain's World Cup fortunes are tied to the health of Lamine Yamal's left leg.
images.alt: Spain's Lamine Yamal, right, scores his side third goal during the UEFA Nations League quarterfinal second leg match between the Netherlands and Spain at Mestalla stadium in Valencia, Spain, Sunday, March 23, 2025.

articles.headline: Scotland relishing underdog tag against 'real deal' Morocco - Steve Clarke

images.credit: Andrew Milligan/PA Images via Getty Images

videos.headline: Harry Kane makes England history with first-half double
videos.description: Harry Kane joins Gary Lineker as England's leading World Cup goalscorer with two first-half goals in the Three Lions' WC opener against Croatia.

tracking.trackingName: INET_World Cup Highlight (Harry Kane makes England history with first-half double) 2026/06/18 AUS ONLY

videos.headline: Baturina laces a long-range screamer against England
videos.description: Martin Baturina nets a beautiful goal from outside the area for Croatia, though the Vatreni ultimately fall 4-2 to England in their World Cup opener.

tracking.trackingName: INET_World Cup Highlight (Baturina laces a long-range screamer against England) 2026/06/18 AUS ONLY

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! England 1, Croatia 0. Harry Kane (England) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! England 1, Croatia 1. Martin Baturina (Croatia) right footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Petar Sucic.
Goal! England 2, Croatia 1. Harry Kane (England) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross following a corner.
Goal! England 2, Croatia 2. Petar Musa (Croatia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ivan Perisic with a headed pass.
Second Half begins England 2, Croatia 2.
Goal! England 3, Croatia 2. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Elliot Anderson.
Substitution, Croatia. Mateo Kovacic replaces Luka Modric.
Substitution, Croatia. Igor Matanovic replaces Petar Musa.
Substitution, Croatia. Marco Pasalic replaces Luka Vuskovic.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, England. Morgan Rogers replaces Declan Rice.
Substitution, England. Bukayo Saka replaces Noni Madueke.
Substitution, England. Marcus Rashford replaces Anthony Gordon.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Croatia. Andrej Kramaric replaces Mario Pasalic.
Substitution, Croatia. Nikola Vlasic replaces Martin Baturina.
Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Jude Bellingham.
Goal! England 4, Croatia 2. Marcus Rashford (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bukayo Saka.
Substitution, England. Marc Guéhi replaces John Stones.
Second Half ends, England 4, Croatia 2.

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: draws
stats.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

stats.name: foulsCommitted
stats.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

stats.name: foulsSuffered
stats.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

stats.name: goalDifference
stats.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

stats.name: handBalls
stats.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

stats.name: losses
stats.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

stats.name: lostCorners
stats.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

stats.name: minutes
stats.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

stats.name: ownGoals
stats.description: The number of own goals conceded.

stats.name: passPct
stats.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

stats.name: redCards
stats.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

stats.name: starts
stats.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

stats.name: subIns
stats.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

stats.name: subOuts
stats.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

stats.name: suspensions
stats.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

stats.name: timeEnded
stats.description: The time a match ends.

stats.name: timeStarted
stats.description: The time a match starts.

stats.name: winPct
stats.description: The percentage of matches won.

stats.name: wins
stats.description: The number of matches won.

stats.name: wonCorners
stats.description: The number of corners won.

stats.name: yellowCards
stats.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events
